description: Same domain: PostgreSQL replication vs indexing. Overlapping terms: PostgreSQL, index, default
topic_a_facts: Primary database port is 5432

MyISAM lacks transaction support
table can be repaired after crashes

description: Hard same-domain: Elasticsearch queries vs aggregations. Overlapping terms: Elasticsearch, field, type, query. Recency trap: store reversed.
topic_a_facts: Term query matches exact values in a field
